text:
## Per-Repository Health Report

| Repository | Open PRs | Merged PRs Closing Linear Issues |
|------------|----------|----------------------------------|
| acme/api   | 7        | 2                                |
| acme/web   | 14       | 3                                |
| acme/mobile| 8        | 6                                |
| acme/infra | 7        | 4                                |

**Repository with the most open pull requests: acme/web (14 open PRs)**

data: {"value":{"defined":"prs","count":80,"peek":{"number":1000,"repo":"acme/api","title":"Onboarding funnel drop-off: add test for…","author":"ivan"}},"defined":["prs"],"defs":{"prs":{"count":80,"peek":{"number":1000,"repo":"acme/api","title":"Onboarding funnel drop-off: add test for…","author":"ivan"}}…(+2)

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def by-repo (group-by :repo prs))

(def report
  (map (fn [[repo repo-prs]]
         {:repo repo
          :open (count (filter #(= (:state %) "open") repo-prs))
          :merged-closing-linear (count (filter #(and (= (:state %) "merged") (:closes_linear %)) repo-prs))})
       by-repo))

report"}
